title: Student
Prototypes
hero.subtitle: Explore innovative prototypes developed by IIT Jammu students. From healthcare solutions to assistive devices, these projects showcase creativity and real-world impact.

featured.heading: Featured Prototypes
featured.subheading: Browse through a collection of student-built prototypes from Invention Factory and InventX programs.
featured.noResults: No prototypes found matching your search criteria.

prototypes.title: Crepe Bandage Applicator
prototypes.description: An automatic applicator that simplifies and standardizes bandage wrapping for medical use.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Crepe Bandage Applicator
A user-friendly device designed to simplify the application of crepe bandages. It ensures uniform pressure and reduces manual effort, especially useful in emergency or clinical settings.

prototypes.title: Fluid Flex Sensor
prototypes.description: A flexible, fluid-based motion sensor for wearables and robotics applications.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Fluid Flex Sensor
A next-generation sensor that measures bending and movement using a liquid-conductive path, enabling applications in prosthetics, robotics, and motion capture.

prototypes.title: Self Lubricating Tampon
prototypes.description: A comfort-enhanced tampon that self-lubricates during insertion.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Self Lubricating Tampon
Innovative menstrual hygiene product that automatically lubricates when inserted, ensuring comfort and safety while reducing the risk of micro-tears.

prototypes.title: Toothbrush Sterilizer
prototypes.description: A smart sterilizer that disinfects toothbrushes using mist technology and sensors.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Toothbrush Sterilizer
An automated sterilization chamber for toothbrushes that uses atomized mist and IR sensors to ensure hygiene and eliminate bacteria effectively.

prototypes.title: Larvae Extractor
prototypes.description: A medical device for safe extraction of larvae during myiasis treatment.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Larvae Extractor
A handheld medical device combining suction and chemical suffocation to remove larvae from animal or human wounds safely and efficiently.

prototypes.title: Smart Helmet Strap System
prototypes.description: An emergency-triggered tightening helmet strap system for safety during accidents.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Smart Helmet Strap System
Detects sudden impact using acceleration sensors and automatically tightens the helmet strap to prevent dislodging during collisions.

prototypes.title: Assistive CPR Device
prototypes.description: A manual chest compression aid providing real-time feedback on CPR quality.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Assistive CPR Device
Portable, sensor-based CPR tool offering real-time feedback on depth, force, and frequency — improving first-aid training and emergency response.

prototypes.title: Fire Extinguisher Training Simulator
prototypes.description: Water-based extinguisher replica for hands-on fire safety training.
prototypes.longDescription:
# Fire Extinguisher Training Simulator
An Arduino-based training extinguisher replicating the behavior of a real one — allowing safe, repeatable fire safety practice sessions.

cards.title: Safety & Assistive Tech

showcase.heading: Innovation Showcase
showcase.summary: Through Invention Factory and InventX, IIT Jammu students continue to develop impactful solutions to real-world challenges in healthcare, safety, and sustainability.

getInvolved.heading: Join the Innovation Movement
getInvolved.summary: Have an idea that can make a difference? Get mentorship, resources, and lab access to bring your prototype to life.

steps.title: Submit Your Idea
steps.description: Pitch your concept to our innovation cell

steps.title: Collaborate & Design
steps.description: Form a team and plan your prototype

steps.title: Build & Test
steps.description: Use campus labs to create your working model

steps.title: Showcase & Scale
